title: Customizable calendar reporting for external audience
excerpt: I recommend significant improvements to the calendar view on Monday. It would be very beneficial to be able to export a more usable view. Can we get more customizable features to the calendar view by allowing removal of …

posts.author: Madison (Madison MacRitchie)
posts.cookedHtml: I recommend significant improvements to the calendar view on Monday. It would be very beneficial to be able to export a more usable view. Can we get more customizable features to the calendar view by allowing removal of weekends (showing only M-F week days), extending columns and rows and changing text size and allowing wrapping of text to fit more text in the cells without it getting cut off after 3 words. I expect this would be helpful broadly for anyone with stakeholders outside of a deal or project team that want to share an external calendar view to a professional audience.
